title: Pending transfer investigation
resolution: Do not repeat the transfer. Check the switch message lifecycle, acknowledgement, settlement state, and reversal eligibility.

title: Failed but debited auto-reversal procedure
resolution: Review the failure code and reversal ledger. Initiate the approved auto-reversal workflow when eligible and reconcile the sender ledger.

title: Confirmed reversal customer guidance
resolution: Confirm the reversal record and advise the customer to refresh the wallet and inspect the latest statement. Escalate only when the ledger does not reflect the reversal.

title: Completed transaction but receiver not credited
resolution: Compare switch completion with the receiver wallet posting and settlement acknowledgement. Do not issue a duplicate credit without reconciliation.

title: Unauthorized transaction first response
resolution: Treat as urgent, secure the account through approved controls, preserve evidence, review device and authentication events, and contact the customer through an authenticated channel.

title: Wrong-beneficiary dispute
resolution: Open a wrong-beneficiary dispute. Do not promise recovery. Verify authorization and follow the approved dispute process.

title: Fee and amount reconciliation
resolution: Compare the applied fee with the active tariff and reconcile debit, credit, and fee-ledger entries.

title: Secure complaint handling rules
resolution: Verify the customer before revealing transaction data. Never request a PIN, OTP, password, or secret. Record an audit event for each case.
